title: conv transpose output_shape mismatch aborts on CPU but errors on GPU
bug_type: CPU/GPU exception inconsistency / fatal check failure

source.document: 基于大语言模型的深度学习库模糊测试.pdf
source.section: 附录 缺陷触发代码示例

trigger: Pass an output_shape with rank 3 to conv2d_transpose, which expects rank 4 or rank 2 in this path.
expected: CPU and GPU should consistently return a framework-level InvalidArgumentError.
observed: GPU reports InvalidArgumentError; CPU aborts after a CHECK failure about invalid dimension index.
